questionHtml: Explain two ways a government might respond to the existence of asymmetric information in a market.
markschemeHtml:
Answers may include:

  • Definition: asymmetric information.
  • Explanation: of adverse selection, moral hazard, and government responses such as regulation, legislation or the provision of information.
  • Diagram: not needed for this question

meta.title: Explain two ways a government might respond to the existence of asymmetric information in a market.
